title: Enforce per-repository active ball guard
goal: Make repo-balls or status projection show one active ball per repository, with ambiguity and conflicts visible per repo rather than as one global bottleneck.

acceptance.assertion: A deterministic command or projection lists every known repository with active, none, blocked or ambiguous ball status.
Two active write balls for the same repository are reported as a blocker.
Independent repositories may each have one active ball without being collapsed into a single global active ball.
